title: ColorChat
description: Can chat in color on Multiplayer Server!
body:
Now you can chat in Colour in your Minecraft Server!

Do you want to offer the player to write in color in the chat? So just use this mod!

The only thing this mod adds is writing in color in the chat. To write in color, just use minecraft color &a, &2, &l, etc... And thanks to this mod, the text will be edited!
